ddls:
CREATE TABLE "distilleries" (
  "distillery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distillery */,
  "distillery_name" TEXT /* Name of the distillery */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the distillery is located */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postal code for the distillery's location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the distillery */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the distillery */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the distillery was established */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the distillery's official website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the distillery */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the distillery */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the distillery */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the distillery */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the distillery is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distillery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flavor_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flavor profile */,
  "distillery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the distillery this profile belongs to */,
  "body" INTEGER /* Intensity of body flavor */,
  "sweetness" INTEGER /* Level of sweetness */,
  "smoky" INTEGER /* Level of smokiness */,
  "medicinal" INTEGER /* Level of medicinal notes */,
  "tobacco" INTEGER /* Level of tobacco notes */,
  "honey" INTEGER /* Level of honey notes */,
  "spicy" INTEGER /* Level of spiciness */,
  "winey" INTEGER /* Level of winey notes */,
  "nutty" INTEGER /* Level of nuttiness */,
  "malty" INTEGER /* Level of malty notes */,
  "fruity" INTEGER /* Level of fruity notes */,
  "floral" INTEGER /* Level of floral notes */,
  "alcohol_content" REAL /* Percentage of alcohol by volume */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the whisky in years */,
  "cask_type" TEXT /* Type of cask used */,
  "flavor_notes" TEXT /* Additional flavor notes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the flavor profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flavor_profiles_distillery_id FOREIGN KEY ("distillery_id") REFERENCES distilleries ("distillery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., enthusiast, reviewer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the review */,
  "distillery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distillery being reviewed */,
  "flavor_profile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flavor profile being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user about the distillery */,
  "tasting_notes" TEXT /* Detailed tasting notes provided by the user */,
  "pairing_suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions for food or drink pairings with the whisky */,
  "is_recommended" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user recommends the whisky */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_distillery_id FOREIGN KEY ("distillery_id") REFERENCES distilleries ("distillery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_flavor_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("flavor_profile_id") REFERENCES flavor_profiles ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "flavor_profile_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flavor profile being analyzed */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the trend analysis */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating for that flavor profile in that year */,
  "flavor_attribute" TEXT /* Specific flavor attribute being analyzed */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., user reviews, expert opinions) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the trend (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_flavor_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("flavor_profile_id") REFERENCES flavor_profiles ("profile_id")
)
